intent_nl: Look up an attribute of the input object whose name is stored in the input's own 'name' field, and return that attribute's value.

samples.intent_nl: Look up an attribute of the input object whose name is stored in the input's own 'name' field, and return that attribute's value.

coverage.description: The value named by the input's name field is returned.
A different stored name selects a different attribute.
